title: Hard interruption at 8 kHz, degraded telephony line (mu-law + mild packet loss)
why_it_matters: The exact reference_render of gl-8k-hard-interrupt, re-rendered through a degraded telephony line: G.711 mu-law companding plus a fixed, mild, short and infrequent packet-loss schedule. Proves the scorer's PASS verdict is stable across codec degradation, not just clean 8 kHz.

telephony_degradation.note: Post-processed by corpus/classes/telephony_codec.py (degrade_telephony) after the standard deterministic render, applied identically to both channels.
